title: determinism evidence demand
description:
A caller-authored demand on the fingerprint's accumulated evidence.

The registration kernel (``docs/design/registration-kernel.md``) DEMANDS
evidence tiers — e.g. "fingerprint at main-scale, n>=3" — and the fingerprint
exposes ONE pure predicate (``state/determinism.py::evidence_meets``) that
consumes exactly this shape, counting ADMITTED CURRENT-identity samples only.
Core matches by identity and counts, never interprets.

min_n.description: Minimum admitted samples (n_full + n_partial both count) the evidence must carry.
min_n.title: Min N

min_n_full.description: Optional separate demand on scale-quality — full (non-partial) admitted samples only, over the n_full leg the evidence block isolates.
min_n_full.title: Min N Full

scales.description: Scale labels the evidence must cover (empty = no scale constraint). Plural.
scales.title: Scales

clusters.description: Measuring clusters the evidence must cover (empty = no cluster constraint). Plural.
clusters.title: Clusters
